inclusion: all 9 subjects, both sessions (train T + eval E); 22 EEG channels @ 250 Hz
exclusion: EOG channels; trials with documented artifacts per dataset metadata only
preprocessing: fixed band-pass 8-30 Hz, fixed epoch [0.5, 2.5] s post-cue; no per-subject tuning
statistic: sampen_lower_tail_m2_r015_v1 with S2 finite-N rule (p <= alpha/2 = 0.025)
correction: Benjamini-Hochberg FDR across subjects x classes

success_threshold.positive_control: epochs with motor-imagery structure SURVIVED fraction >= 0.80 (per class)

failure_threshold: specificity combined FPR > 0.05 OR positive-control SURVIVED < 0.80
forbidden: BNCI validated before execution artifacts exist
note: Re-frozen as a complete executable lock after the prior BNCI_BLOCKED_LOCK_INCOMPLETE audit (runner implements the locked SampEn+MIAAFT+AR-null method; deterministic channel->epoch aggregation specified; placeholder removed). Method/thresholds/alpha unchanged from the original preregistration. Execution under explicit authorization.
channel_aggregation: spatial mean across the 22 EEG channels (common-average), one signal per epoch (FROZEN, deterministic)
epoch_policy: all trials per class, both sessions (train+test), trial-order deterministic
positive_control_unit: per epoch (channel-mean signal); SURVIVED if BH-FDR-adjusted lower-tail p <= 0.025
expected_channels: 22 EEG (non-EEG ignored via MOABB MotorImagery paradigm)
missing_channel_policy: MotorImagery paradigm returns EEG only; no manual drop
failed_subject_policy: record in subjects_failed; never silently skipped; no removal from denominator intent
